title: scutellaria andina
intro: Scutellaria andina, also known as Andean skullcap, is a plant species native to the Andean region of South America. It is a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria andina include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and protect against age-related cognitive decline. Herbal preparations of Scutellaria andina can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
